name: Carribean Crock
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinovate the dried beans with the desired type of meat.
2. Add the leftover rib bones and chopped onions to the pot.
3. Chop the green onions and add them along with the fresh green beans.
4. Sprinkle the Chinese 5 spice over the ingredients.
5. Pour in the water (or enough liquid to cover the ingredients) until the pot is full.
6. Stir everything together and let it cook on low heat for a few hours or until tender.
7. Optionally, add colorful peppers near the end of cooking.
8. Add fresh tomatoes (Italian variety preferred) if desired.
9. Include ripe black olives (avoid green ones).
10. Toss in pecans and whole grapes for extra flavor.
11. Serve with toasted baby bagels or rye toast and a sprinkle of fine white cheese like Gruyère or Brie.
